name: investigation-loop
description: ARIA's stateful investigation agent - a hand-built LangGraph loop (gather evidence, hypothesize, verify, loop or conclude) for diagnosing intermittent or unclear Kubernetes issues. Read-only, no mutating tools.

skills.name: Cyclic Root-Cause Investigation
skills.description: Investigates intermittent or unclear Kubernetes issues by iteratively gathering evidence, forming a hypothesis, verifying it, and looping if unconfirmed (bounded iterations, read-only tools only).
